title: The Brigand's Tongue
target: wring the location of the bandit cache out of the prisoner before dawn

contributions.line: Marek's muscular presence and soldier's grit force the prisoner into trembling silence, his false calm cracking.
Veska's sharp eyes catch inconsistencies in the man's story, her stoic patience wearing him down.

outcomeNarrative: Between Marek's intimidation and Veska's keen perception, the prisoner faltered, revealing the bandit cache's location before dawn.
